title: Trump's Tariff Storm: From Global Markets to Your Morning Burrito
subtitle: How trade wars cascade through interconnected systems to reach the most unexpected places

ripples.headline: Global stock markets plummet as investors flee to safe havens amid escalating trade tensions
Major automakers halt production as cross-border supply chains face immediate disruption
Grocery chains scramble to secure alternative suppliers as food import costs surge 25%
Restaurant industry faces margin squeeze as ingredient costs soar across the board
Local taco shops raise prices by $2-3 per item to offset imported ingredient costs
Food delivery apps experience 40% drop in orders as customers balk at premium prices
Karen from accounting's DoorDash burrito arrives 45 minutes late and costs $23.50

symphony_arc.opening: Trade barriers slam down like fortress gates
symphony_arc.development: Economic tremors ripple through interconnected supply webs
symphony_arc.climax: Global systems buckle under cascading price pressures
symphony_arc.resolution: The butterfly effect reaches Karen's overpriced lunch
